name: Transcend PCIe SSD 255S 2TB M.2-2280 Internal Solid State Drive - PCI Express Gen 4 x4 - NVMe 1.4 - 3D NAND Flash - Multi-Channel Controller - Ultra-thin Graphene Heatsink - Sequential Read up to 7400 MB/s - Sequential Write up to 6500 MB/s (TS2TMTE255S)
description: Internal NVMe SSD with PCIe Gen4 and graphene heatsink for high-speed performance in gaming and workstations.
